prompt_text:
### Demographics: 47-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Occasional GI side effects (nausea/loose stool)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Planned dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 81.9 kg; Height 169.5 cm; BMI 28.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 141/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.4%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 8.2%; 3 months ago 7.7%; current 6.2%), FPG (12 months ago 265mg/dL; 9 months ago 228mg/dL; 6 months ago 175mg/dL; 3 months ago 157mg/dL; current 141mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.8kg; 9 months ago 79.2kg; 6 months ago 78.7kg; 3 months ago 75.9kg; current 81.9kg), Height (12 months ago 169.5cm; 9 months ago 169.5cm; 6 months ago 169.5cm; 3 months ago 169.5cm; current 169.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 27.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 27.0kg/m²; current 28.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 142mmHg; 9 months ago 140mmHg; 6 months ago 145mmHg; 3 months ago 142mmHg; current 141mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 46U/L; 9 months ago 36U/L; 6 months ago 40U/L; 3 months ago 37U/L; current 44U/L), AST (12 months ago 61U/L; 9 months ago 55U/L; 6 months ago 54U/L; 3 months ago 53U/L; current 68U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 7.9mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 9.7mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 5.8mL/min/1.73m²; current 6mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 500mg/g; 9 months ago 353mg/g; 6 months ago 476mg/g; 3 months ago 320mg/g; current 365mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 93mg/dL; 9 months ago 95mg/dL; 6 months ago 94mg/dL; 3 months ago 97mg/dL; current 96mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 42mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 42mg/dL; 3 months ago 38mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 119mg/dL; 9 months ago 118mg/dL; 6 months ago 100mg/dL; 3 months ago 104mg/dL; current 112mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.2g/dL; 3 months ago 10.0g/dL; current 9.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.72 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
